html:
Exclusive to:

“Engraved markings, enduring through eternity. Perhaps decipherable.”

-

The Sanctum Lunarune Stone is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Ancient Echoes update. They can be found within the Sanctum. On the Sanctum Lunarune Stone, there are messages that can only be read when wearing Ancient Masks.

Translations

When wearing Ancient Masks, examine the Sanctum Lunarune Stone in the following rooms:

  • Lobby room: "This vault shall become a tomb for all who dare trespass."
  • Crossroads room: "Bound together are these chambers, yet in ways unnatural, wrought to confound all who enter."
  • King Statue Room: "Trust none. The Shadow twists all it touches."
  • Gate Statue Room: "Through the Keystone, all kin and kind shall fall."
  • Guard Statues Room: "Let the cursed Keystone never cross this threshold."
  • Sequitor's Puzzle: "Paths are taken but once. Leap wisely, tarry not, or the abyss claims all."
  • Flummoxing Flame Puzzle: "Only when all torches burn shall the way be revealed."
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Exclusive to:
“I can't read that.”
–Wilson
“That's stupid.”
–Willow
“Cute scribblemarks.”
–Wolfgang
“What's the point?”
–Wendy
“SYNTAX ERROR”
–WX-78
“These are complicated.”
–Wickerbottom
“Maybe I'm reading them upside-down.”
–Woodie
“I don't recognize these runes.”
–Maxwell
“I knöw nöt these runes.”
–Wigfrid
“Nice drawings.”
–Webber
“I have no idea.”
–Warly
“Scratch, scratch, scratch?”
–Wormwood
“Ain't a chance I can read that!”
–Winona
“Makes sense.”
–Wortox
“Glorph... who cares.”
–Wurt
“What do these symbols mean?”
–Walter
“I'll not figure this out anytime soon.”
–Wanda
“Engraved markings, enduring through eternity. Perhaps decipherable.”

The Sanctum Lunarune Stone is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Ancient Echoes update. They can be found within the Sanctum. On the Sanctum Lunarune Stone, there are messages that can only be read when wearing Ancient Masks.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đá Sanctum Lunarune là một vật thể sinh sản tự nhiên dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật Ancient Echoes. Chúng có thể được tìm thấy trong Sanctum. Trên Sanctum Lunarune Stone có những thông điệp chỉ có thể đọc được khi đeo Mặt nạ cổ.

{{Scrapbook Info|Engraved markings, enduring through eternity. Perhaps decipherable.}}

The '''Sanctum Lunarune Stone''' is a naturally spawning object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in the ''[[Ancient Echoes]]'' update. They can be found within the [[Sanctum]]. On the Sanctum Lunarune Stone, there are messages that can only be read when wearing [[Ancient Mask]]s.

=={{Pic|32|Elytra's Mask}} Translations==
When wearing [[Ancient Mask]]s, examine the Sanctum Lunarune Stone in the following rooms:
* [[Sanctum#Lobby|Lobby]] room: "This vault shall become a tomb for all who dare trespass."
* [[Sanctum#Crossroads|Crossroads]] room: "Bound together are these chambers, yet in ways unnatural, wrought to confound all who enter."
* [[Sanctum#Statue Room|King Statue Room]]: "Trust none. The Shadow twists all it touches."
* [[Sanctum#Statue Room|Gate Statue Room]]: "Through the Keystone, all kin and kind shall fall."
* [[Sanctum#Statue Room|Guard Statues Room]]: "Let the cursed Keystone never cross this threshold."
* [[Sequitor's Puzzle]]: "Paths are taken but once. Leap wisely, tarry not, or the abyss claims all."
* [[Flummoxing Flame Puzzle]]: "Only when all torches burn shall the way be revealed."
